ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "statement_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial statement */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period covered by the statement */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the statement was last updated */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the financial statement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial statement (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the financial statement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_period FOREIGN KEY ("period") REFERENCES statement_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement */,
  "line_item_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the line item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value or status of the line item */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the line item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the line item (e.g., assets, liabilities, equity) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the line item (e.g., current assets, long-term liabilities) */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system from which the data was pulled */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Audit status of the line item (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equity_capital" (
  "equity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equity capital entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement */,
  "equity_type" TEXT /* Type of equity capital */,
  "total_value" TEXT /* Total value of the equity capital */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the equity capital */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system from which the data was pulled */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Audit status of the equity capital entry (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equity_capital_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minority_interest" (
  "minority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minority interest entry */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the minority interest */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the minority interest */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system from which the data was pulled */,
  "audit_status" TEXT /* Audit status of the minority interest entry (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minority_interest_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial statement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when accessing the statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_access_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the statement's history */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statement_history_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_item_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change in the line item's history */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the line item */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user when making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_item_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_item_history_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES line_items ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial statement audited */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor performing the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the audit was performed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the auditor when performing the audit */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_statement_id FOREIGN KEY ("statement_id") REFERENCES financial_statements ("statement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
